chunks.summary: created CONTRIBUTING.md for the project with setup, making changes, PR, and issue reporting sections

planned+impl 3-level compression algorithm (raw/compact/dense) in server.py. Uses abbreviation dict (py,js,db,srv,auth,fe,be etc) + filler word removal. Read-time only, raw JSON preserved on disk. Added set_compression tool. 35/35 tests pass
security review of compression changes — no vulnerabilities found. Analyzed regex injection, int() conversion, set_compression abuse, delete_memory consistency

researched mempalace AAAK dialect (lossy summarization, 84.2% vs 96.6% raw on LongMemEval). Confirmed our lossless approach is better for short key-value memory. Discussed ML vs rule-based compression — ML overkill for 1-2 sentence entries

planned+impl conversation history hook system. history_hook.py fires every 10 UserPromptSubmit msgs + PreCompact. Reads transcript .jsonl, sends to GPT-4o-mini for summarization, saves to .mcp_history.json (20-chunk rolling window). Added save_history+load_history MCP tools. Configured hooks in .claude/settings.local.json. 18/18 tests pass. Needs OPENAI_API_KEY env var + restart to activate
